    MKV | MK5 A90 TOYOTA GR SUPRA  J29

    The Toyota GR Supra (model code J29/DB or A90/A91 for marketing purposes) is a sports car produced by Toyota since 2019. The fifth-generation Supra, the GR Supra was sold under and developed by Toyota Gazoo Racing (TGR) brand in collaboration with BMW. It is the successor of the A80 Supra, which ceased production in 2002.

    -Wikipedia 2024

     

    This platform is where A90 Shop began. Everyone knows the MKV MK5 A90 Toyota Supra GR is no slouch when it comes to performance. The infamous "downpipe and tune" line runs true on this very, very capable platform. With all that we have to offer, you're sure to be able to build your dream.

    From bolt on performance like exhausts, downpipes, intakes, and boost pipes, you can upgrade your factory tuned vehicle. You can also dive into custom tuning and fueling options. Whatever road you decide to take, we can advise and guide you to help you get to where you want to be. 

    Our main ideal is high performance street builds, but we have helped others build track demons, and other with just reliable add-ons. A90 Shop has you covered with everything related to A90 Supra performance parts.
